name_cn:
Top-tier replica, changed code chip
M13357 Black M13358 Khaki
The Coussin Backpack small bag joins the Coussin series with a backpack silhouette, blending a soft Monogram embossed leather with the iconic LV lock, combining modern style and functionality. The removable Coussin chain releases the metal edge, and the zippered front pocket makes it easy to access small items.
26 x 10 x 21 cm
(H x W x D)
Sheepskin
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Metalware
Magnetic closure
Zippered front pocket
Lock
Fits smartphone, 10-inch tablet, keys, Zippy wallet, and earphones
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 30.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 37.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 21.0 cm
Handle: Single handle
